courses_dates_valid.name: courses_dates_valid
courses_dates_valid.value:
"courses"."ends_at" IS NULL
        OR "courses"."starts_at" IS NULL
        OR "courses"."ends_at" >= "courses"."starts_at"

exam_versions_passing_score_not_too_high.name: exam_versions_passing_score_not_too_high
exam_versions_passing_score_not_too_high.value:
"exam_versions"."passing_score" IS NULL
        OR "exam_versions"."questions_per_attempt" IS NULL
        OR "exam_versions"."passing_score" <= "exam_versions"."questions_per_attempt"

participants_kind_course_relation_valid.name: participants_kind_course_relation_valid
participants_kind_course_relation_valid.value:
(
        "participants"."kind" = 'local'
        AND "participants"."course_id" IS NULL
      ) OR (
        "participants"."kind" = 'course'
        AND "participants"."course_id" IS NOT NULL
      )
